problem id: 615a02e6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHR(3) OR NOT SHL(2)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00111110 -> 00000111
  11010010 -> 00101001
  11101001 -> 01010100
  10111100 -> 00011110
  00000001 -> 10000000
  00111111 -> 00000111
  10000000 -> 01000000
  00011100 -> 00001110
  00011001 -> 10001000

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 00110000
